validation_commands: node scripts/install-apply.js --target cursor --profile developer --with lang:typescript --with framework:nextjs --dry-run --json
key_findings: The installer already supports smaller profile-based installs, but the onboarding path did not surface that choice before showing the bundled full install path.
A profile guide is enough here because the existing profiles and component composition model already cover the adoption problem without adding new persona presets.
Clarifying that aw init still defaults to full prevents readers from mistaking the current bundle choice for a hard product limitation.
The documented direct-install examples now dry-run successfully in this worktree once repo dependencies are installed.
